title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following ways of conserving natural resources and promoting sustainability, then decide which two would be most impactful.
options: Introducing water usage limits and metering in cities
Banning single-use plastics and non-recyclable packaging
Implementing circular economy policies for businesses
Educating communities about sustainable consumption habits

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to natural resources and sustainability. Discuss the following ways of conserving natural resources and promoting sustainability, then decide which two would be most impactful. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two would be most impactful..
